_comment: Verified ATS confirmation patterns. Built empirically from real HITL submissions. A platform is added only after a confirmed submission was observed. Do not add entries speculatively.

_schema.url_contains: Substring that must appear in the final URL after submit
_schema.text_contains: One or more substrings that must appear in the visible page text
_schema.failure_text_contains: Substrings that indicate a known failure (e.g. duplicate, error)

lever._evidence: Yuno (dc30ae7b-9c0f-426f-ae77-c58d9e4f6d6d) and Aircall submissions confirmed via URL redirect

workable._evidence: Climax Studios (A03E9A31FE) submission confirmed via ?success query param and 'submitted successfully' text
text_contains: Your application has been submitted successfully
failure_text_contains: There are some issues with your application

greenhouse._evidence: Showpad, Monzo, Forter, TooGoodToGo, OpenUp confirmed via confirmation page text

greenhouse_eu._evidence: JetBrains Agentic Behavior, JetBrains AI for Code, Kayzen submissions confirmed

ashby._evidence: Poolside and Kraken submissions confirmed via confirmation page

teamtailor._evidence: BUX submission — 'You already applied' response confirmed duplicate detection pattern
failure_text_contains: You already applied for this job
